source_jobs.title: Flutter Developer - Legacy Apps Studio
source_jobs.description:
About AppNation
AppNation was founded in 2021 with a mission to develop world-class, AI-powered mobile applications that make a lasting impact on millions of users. We are the creators of Genie, Fotorama, and Arch, delivering innovative solutions that enhance everyday experiences.
Our apps have consistently ranked among the top charts in over 30 countries, reaching more than 70 million users worldwide. Recognized by Apple on the App Store, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation in the mobile tech industry.
For a talented, driven, and collaborative individual, working at AppNation is a chance to learn, make an impact, and accelerate your career at an exceptional pace. That’s our promise.
About the Role
At AppNation's Legacy Studio, we're looking for a Flutter Developer to work on both our long-standing mobile apps used by millions of users and new products built from the ground up. Our focus is on non-AI utility and productivity apps that solve real, everyday problems.
In this role, you'll be part of a fast-moving team working across multiple products simultaneously, each with its own tech stack. This means timeliness, continuous research and learning, and active knowledge sharing are essential. You'll help existing products grow in a sustainable way while also contributing to the development of new apps from early stages, writing clean and performant Flutter code throughout the entire product lifecycle.

source_jobs.title: Head of Development
source_jobs.description:
AppNation was founded in 2021 with a mission to develop world-class, AI-powered mobile applications that make a lasting impact on millions of users. We are the creators of Genie, Fotorama, and Arch, delivering innovative solutions that enhance everyday experiences.
Our apps have consistently ranked among the top charts in over 30 countries, reaching more than 80 million users worldwide. Recognized by Apple on the App Store, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation in the mobile tech industry. For a talented, driven, and collaborative individual, working at AppNation is a chance to learn, make an impact, and accelerate your career at an exceptional pace. That’s our promise.
About the Role
We’re looking for a hands-on leader to own AppNation’s technical vision and execution. You’ll lead the development cycle across Backend, Mobile, Frontend, and QA, building high-performance products used by millions of users worldwide.
This isn’t a 'sit-back-and-delegate' role. You’ll stay close to the code, set the engineering bar, and embed AI-first development practices into our daily DNA. Working directly with leadership, you will align our tech stack with business growth while fostering a fast-paced culture where people take radical ownership of their work

source_jobs.title: Marketing Artist
source_jobs.description:
AppNation was founded in 2021 with a mission to develop world-class, AI-powered mobile applications that make a lasting impact on millions of users. We are the creators of Genie, Fotorama, and Arch, delivering innovative solutions that enhance everyday experiences.
Our apps have consistently ranked among the top charts in over 30 countries, reaching more than 70 million users worldwide. Recognized by Apple on the App Store, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation in the mobile tech industry. For a talented, driven, and collaborative individual, working at AppNation is a chance to learn, make an impact, and accelerate your career at an exceptional pace. That’s our promise.
About the Role
At AppNation, creativity is not a support function, it is one of the core growth drivers behind our products. As a Marketing Artist, you will play a key role in shaping how millions of users discover, engage with and connect with our apps across global markets.
You will work at the intersection of performance marketing, motion design, storytelling and AI-powered creativity. From high-performing ad creatives and motion videos to static concepts and experimental formats, you will help transform growth ideas into scalable marketing assets.
This role is not only about executing designs, it’s about understanding user psychology, platform trends and creative performance. You will collaborate closely with User Acquisition Managers, Product teams and fellow creatives to rapidly test new concepts, iterate based on data and continuously push creative boundaries.
We move fast, experiment aggressively and embrace new technologies. Whether it’s creating motion-heavy ad concepts, leveraging AI tools like Midjourney and HeyGen or exploring the next wave of creative automation, you’ll have the freedom and ownership to make a direct impact on the growth of our products.

source_jobs.title: Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
AppNation was founded in 2021 with a mission to develop world-class, AI-powered mobile applications that make a lasting impact on millions of users. We are the creators of Genie, Fotorama, and Arch, delivering innovative solutions that enhance everyday experiences.

Our apps have consistently ranked among the top charts in over 30 countries, reaching more than 80 million users worldwide. Recognized by Apple on the App Store, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation in the mobile tech industry. For a talented, driven, and collaborative individual, working at AppNation is a chance to learn, make an impact, and accelerate your career at an exceptional pace. That’s our promise.

About the Role

At AppNation, we don't just run campaigns; we build businesses. As Marketing Manager, you will take full ownership of the growth strategy for our apps. You will go beyond campaign execution—you will act as the 'Growth Lead' for your products, sitting at the intersection of data, creative strategy, and product development.

We give you the budget, the tools, and the autonomy to scale world-class apps. If you are a proactive builder who thrives on high-volume budgets and rapid experimentation, this is your playground.

source_jobs.title: Marketing Specialist
source_jobs.description:
AppNation was founded in 2021 with a mission to develop world-class, AI-powered mobile applications that make a lasting impact on millions of users. We are the creators of Genie, Fotorama, and Arch, delivering innovative solutions that enhance everyday experiences.
Our apps have consistently ranked among the top charts in over 30 countries, reaching more than 80 million users worldwide. Recognized by Apple on the App Store, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation in the mobile tech industry. For a talented, driven, and collaborative individual, working at AppNation is a chance to learn, make an impact, and accelerate your career at an exceptional pace. That’s our promise.
About the Role 
As a  Marketing Specialist at AppNation, you will play a key role in executing and optimizing user acquisition campaigns that directly drive the growth of our products. This is a hands-on role where you will actively manage campaigns, analyze performance data, and continuously improve results through testing and iteration.
You will work closely with creative, product, and data teams to turn insights into actionable optimizations and uncover new growth opportunities. We’re looking for someone who is curious, detail-oriented, and eager to learn - someone who can take ownership of their work, adapt quickly, and grow in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment.
This role offers a strong foundation for building expertise in performance marketing, with the opportunity to take on more ownership and impact as you develop.

About AI Apps Studio
AI Apps Studio is AppNation’s dedicated product studio focused on building AI-powered consumer mobile applications. We turn cutting-edge AI capabilities into intuitive, high-scale products used daily by millions of users - where the technology disappears and the experience is all that’s left.

source_jobs.title: Senior Mobile Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About AppNation
AppNation was founded in 2021 with a mission to develop world-class, AI-powered mobile applications that make a lasting impact on millions of users. We are the creators of Genie, Fotorama, and Arch, delivering innovative solutions that enhance everyday experiences.
Our apps have consistently ranked among the top charts in over 30 countries, reaching more than 70 million users worldwide. Recognized by Apple on the App Store, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation in the mobile tech industry. For a talented, driven, and collaborative individual, working at AppNation is a chance to learn, make an impact, and accelerate your career at an exceptional pace. That’s our promise.
About the Role
At AppNation, we're looking for a Senior Mobile Engineer to be a technical anchor across our mobile products-apps used by millions of users, spanning AI-powered experiences as well as utility and productivity apps. Some are long-standing products we continue to scale, while others are built from the ground up.
As a senior member of the team, you'll own mobile development end to end, solving complex technical challenges with deep native expertise while setting the bar for quality, performance and engineering excellence. You'll work across multiple products and technology stacks, scaling existing apps, building new ones from scratch and delivering clean, performant and maintainable code throughout the product lifecycle.
